_comment: Example variable values for the pharmacy voice agent s2s template. Replace every placeholder with your organization's actual values before deploying.
_section_agent_names: --- Agent Config Names (must match agent names configured in your D365 environment) ---
_section_tools: --- Tool / Flow Names (replace with your actual tool or Power Automate flow names in D365) ---
_section_mock: --- Mock / Demo Data (used only for testing; remove in production) ---
